0x0001 = wrong working counter of 1. EtherCAT command received
	0x0002 = wrong working counter of 2. EtherCAT command received
	0x0004 = wrong working counter of 3. EtherCAT command received
	...
	0x4000 = wrong working counter of 15. EtherCAT command received
	0x8000 = complete frame missing

0x0001 = 1. EtherCAT command NOT sent (NOP requested)
	0x0002 = 2. EtherCAT command NOT sent (NOP requested)

	...

	0x8000 = complete frame NOT sent

	0x0002 = 2. EtherCAT command NOT sent (NOP requested)
	0x0004 = 3. EtherCAT command NOT sent (NOP requested)
	...
	0x4000 = 15. EtherCAT command NOT sent (NOP requested)
	0x8000 = complete frame NOT sent

0x0001 = Link error
	0x0002 = I/O locked after link error (I/O reset required)
	0x0004 = Link error (redundancy adapter)
	0x0008 = Missing one frame (redundancy mode)
	0x0010 = Out of send resources (I/O reset required)
	0x0020 = Watchdog triggered
	0x0040 = Ethernet driver (miniport) not found
	0x0080 = I/O reset active
	0x0100 = At least one device in 'INIT' state
	0x0200 = At least one device in 'PRE-OP' state
	0x0400 = At least one device in 'SAFE-OP' state
	0x0800 = At least one device indicates an error state
	0x1000 = DC not in sync

0x0001 = wrong working counter of 1. EtherCAT command received
	0x0002 = wrong working counter of 2. EtherCAT command received
	0x0004 = wrong working counter of 3. EtherCAT command received
	...
	0x4000 = wrong working counter of 15. EtherCAT command received
	0x8000 = complete frame missing

0x___1 = Slave in 'INIT' state
		0x___2 = Slave in 'PREOP' state
		0x___3 = Slave in 'BOOT' state
		0x___4 = Slave in 'SAFEOP' state
		0x___8 = Slave in 'OP' state
		0x001_ = Slave signals error
		0x002_ = Invalid vendorId, productCode... read
		0x004_ = Initialization error occurred
		0x008_ = Slave disabled
		0x010_ = Slave NOT present
		0x020_ = Slave signals link error
		0x040_ = Slave signals missing link
		0x080_ = Slave signals unexpected link
		0x100_ = Communication port A
		0x200_ = Communication port B
		0x400_ = Communication port C
		0x800_ = Communication port D

0x___1 = Slave in 'INIT' state
	0x___2 = Slave in 'PREOP' state
	0x___3 = Slave in 'BOOT' state
	0x___4 = Slave in 'SAFEOP' state
	0x___8 = Slave in 'OP' state

	0x002_ = Invalid vendorId, productCode... read
	0x004_ = Initialization error occurred
	0x008_ = Slave disabled
	0x010_ = Slave NOT present
	0x020_ = Slave signals link error
	0x040_ = Slave signals missing link
	0x080_ = Slave signals unexpected link
	0x100_ = Communication port A
	0x200_ = Communication port B
	0x400_ = Communication port C
	0x800_ = Communication port D

0: Other side is in OP state
			>0: Error
Bit toggles when new timestamp data available

0: External device connected
			1: External device not connected
Bit toggles when new DC control data available
Bit toggles when new data from other side received

0: no Syncronisation
			1: Secondary side is Sync Master
			2: Primary side is Sync Master

0: Other side is in OP state
			>0: Error

0: External device connected
			1: External device not connected

DeviceState Inputs:
	0x_0 = Port disabled
	0x_1 = Port in std dig in
	0x_2 = Port in std dig out
	0x_3 = Port in communikation OP
	0x_4 = Port in communikation COMSTOP
	0x1_ = Watchdog detected
	0x2_ = internal Error
	0x3_ = invalid Device ID
	0x4_ = invalid Vendor ID
	0x5_ = invalid IO-Link Version
	0x6_ = invalid Frame Capability
	0x7_ = invalid Cycle Time
	0x8_ = invalid PD in length
	0x9_ = invalid PD out length
	0xA_ = no Device detected
	0xB_ = error Preoperate

GLOBALHTTPHEADERS:
{LASTMODIFIED}
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self'

allOf.description: Execute the request for a different ADS port

domain.description: Domain name of the authentication extension

allOf.description: Parameters that are forwarded to the authentication extension's AddUser function. Notice that the userName without the domain is forwarded automatically.

settings.description: Changes to the USERGROUPUSERS entry of the user

userName.description: Name of the user without domain prefix

AUTOMAP.description: Automatically obtain symbol information such as options and schema from the domain.

anyOf.description: Changes to the USERGROUPUSERS entry of the current user.

allOf.description: Parameters that are forwarded to the authentication extension's ChangePassword function.
Calling this method without writeValue will read the current settings.

fileName.description: Name of the file to delete.

anyOf.description: User name. The authentication domain can be specified by using 'Domain::UserName'. If no domain is specified all users with the given name will be logged out.

clientCertificate.description: Thumbprint of the used client certificate

authExtension.description: Shows if extension can be used for user management.

configVersion.description: The version of the extension's configuration.

debuggerAttached.description: indicates whether a debugger is or will be attached to the extension

guid.description: The globally unique identifier associated with the extension.

licensed.description: indicate the extension is license status

packageVersion.description: The version of the NuGet package that contains the extension.

remote.description: Shows if the domain refers to a remote server.

required.description: Shows if the extension is considered to be required.

state.description: Shows the current state of the extension.

thirdParty.description: indicate the extension is a customer extension

updated.description: Shows last update time of the config.

visibility.description: Indicates under which circumstances the extension configuration should be visible.

items.description: List of all users and their permissions.

SCHEMA.description: The SessionId of the logged in user.

domain.description: Domain name of the authentication extension

userName.description: Name of the user without domain prefix

enabled.description: Indicates if the user can be used or not.

password.description: Password of the user. Only a hash will be stored.

newUserName.description: The new name of the user.

checkSum.description: Checksum of the file as MD5 hexadecimal-string.

domain.description: Upload extension dll to remote filesystem.
